channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Joby Aviation is demoing 10-minute air taxi flights from JFK to Manhattan for a week
item.description: Joby Aviation is kicking off 10 days of electric air taxi demo flights in New York City. Before you try to book one to bypass the city's awful traffic, Joby's aircrafts aren't taking customers yet. Instead, the company is trialing the air taxis in "real flight routes and real environments," as indicated in its press release. With the first point-to-point flight of its electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft completed, Joby said that one of its electric air taxis made it from John F. Kennedy International Airport to NYC's heliports in Lower Manhattan and Midtown in less than 10 m...

item.title: What is the release date for Half Man episode 2 on HBO Max and BBC iPlayer?
item.description: Last week's debut was already a difficult watch, but when does Half Man episode 2 drop on HBO Max and BBC iPlayer?

item.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
item.description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft get more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

item.title: 'Unfortunately, it needs to be said: Do not send a text to confirm you are human': Experts reveal how fake CAPTCHAs are driving a global SMS scam campaign
item.description: CAPTCHAs asking you to send an SMS are actually a scam that can cost you big time.

item.title: Can any TV beat this one for value right now? The TCL QM6K is a 75-inch mini-LED that 'punches above its weight' — and it's only $680
item.description: The TCL QM6K is our favorite cheap big screen TV - and it's even cheaper thanks to a massive discount at Best Buy.

item.title: On a roulé avec le nouveau vélo électrique Intersport à moins de 1000 euros : il devrait tout cartonner en 2026
item.description: Alléchant sur le papier, le vélo électrique urbain à 999 euros d’Intersport est passé entre les mains de Frandroid lors du salon Vélo in Paris 2026. Alors, prometteur ce Nakamura Crossover E ? Voici nos premières impressions.

item.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
item.description: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

item.title: Conspiracy theories are swirling about the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting
item.description: On Saturday evening, a room full of journalists, media personalities, and senior members of Donald Trump's administration descended into chaos as gunshots rang out at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Nobody was hurt, and the suspect was taken into custody - but it didn't take long for a narrative of doubt to take hold online. […]

item.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds returns for its penultimate season on July 23
item.description:
Star Trek: Strange New Worlds returns for its fourth season via Paramount Plus on July 23. The ten episodes air weekly until September 24. This is actually the second-to-last batch of episodes, as the show was recently renewed for a fifth and final season.
The streamer has dropped a trailer for season four and it looks promising. The tone looks slightly darker when compared to season three, which was maligned for being a bit too silly and uneven. The trailer is narrated by Anson Mount's Captain Christopher Pike, who discusses the "terror" of space as a planet explodes. This is still Strange N...

item.title: Hacker who allegedly carried out cyberattacks for China is extradited to U.S.
item.description: Xu Zewei is accused of participating in a Chinese government hacking group that broke into thousands of U.S. organizations and stole COVID-19-related research.

item.title: A Brain Implant for Depression Is About to Be Tested in Humans
item.description: While many brain-computer interface companies are focused on helping paralyzed people communicate, Motif Neurotech is targeting mental health disorders.

item.title: Valve's Steam Controller costs $99 and arrives May 4
item.description: Valve's Steam Controller will hit the market on Monday, May 4, for a going price of $99 in the United States. The Steam Controller does precisely what it says: It communicates with anything running Steam or the Steam Link app, so this includes PCs, Macs, mobile devices and the Steam Deck. Eventually, the Steam Controller will connect to the new Steam Machine console and Steam Frame VR headset, but neither of these products have solid release dates just yet. They were originally slated to come out in early 2026 alongside the Steam Controller, but we're nearly five months into the year and only...

item.title: Valve Steam Controller review: A gamepad in search of a console
item.description: Don’t mistake the Steam Controller for a PC controller. Even though its main function is to play PC games, Valve’s new gamepad communicates with Steam, and only Steam. This is not a general controller for your PC, Android or iOS devices, and it’s certainly not compatible with any console on the market today, unless you count the handheld Steam Deck. In order to play a game with the Steam Controller, you have to boot it up through Steam. (More on this later). Valve’s end goal for the Steam Controller is compatibility with the Steam Machine, a console that doesn’t yet have a public release date ...

item.title: Why the Steam Controller is (and isn’t) a big deal
item.description: Most PC gamers already have a controller they love using with Steam - a Sony DualSense, a 8BitDo Ultimate, a Nintendo Switch Pro, or something else. Part of that love comes from Steam treating them like "native" controllers. They can do the things that made the first Steam Controller worth buying. Namely, they offer a […]

item.title: Valve’s new Steam Controller isn’t perfect, but I’m buying one anyway
item.description: After my brief hands-on last year with Valve's new Steam Controller, I said it might be my dream controller. I've been looking for a controller with the customization and sheer function available on Valve's Steam Deck while I'm playing games on the TV. You, me, and a lot of other people have been waiting for […]

item.title: Valve launches the Steam Controller without the Steam Machine
item.description: Last November, Valve introduced the world to its new vision of living room gaming: the Steam Machine and Steam Controller. Then, RAMageddon. Memory shortages forced Valve to delay all its hardware and reset expectations. Now, Valve is releasing the Steam Controller without the Steam Machine. The Steam Controller is officially going on sale May 4th […]...

item.title: We reviewed Valve’s new Steam Controller, ask us anything
item.description: Hey hey, it's Jay Peters, senior reporter at The Verge. Today, Valve finally announced that the second version of the Steam Controller - and the first piece of Valve's slate of new gaming hardware set to launch this year - is finally going on sale for $99 on May 4th. My colleague Cameron Faulkner and […]

item.title: I’m a PC gamer of over 30 years, and the Valve Steam Controller (2026) is now one of my favorite gamepads since Sega dropped out of the console wars
item.description: Valve has released a new gamepad, the Steam Controller – it’s just waiting for the Steam Machine to really shine.

item.title: ‘Every label in the world is delivering AI’: Apple Music executive says over a third of uploads are ‘100% AI’ as it clamps down on AI fraud
item.description: Apple Music VP reveals that more AI-generated music is being uploaded to the platform, but it's not affecting listening habits.

item.title: James Gunn cautiously reveals that 2 beleaguered DC comic book shows are still 'in development' — but the DCU's biggest movie gamble has been shelved
item.description: James Gunn has opened up on three DCU projects that he's struggled to get off the ground.

item.title: The Ninja Creami is no longer the only ice cream machine in town — here are the alternatives I have my eye on for this summer's chilled treats
item.description: Including a budget-friendly ice cream machine that promises a perfect, single-serve chilled treat in 20 minutes flat.

item.title: My top 10 Amazon deals for a smarter office set-up — essential desk accessories from TP-Link, Lexar, Cooler Master, and more
item.description: Upgrade your workspace with discounted networking gear, keyboards, storage drives, mice and other everyday office accessories on Amazon.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds FE, Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 5 et clavier MSI Strike Pro Wireless : les 3 meilleurs bons plans du lundi 27 avril 2026
item.description: Ce lundi 27 avril 2026, plusieurs offres high-tech se démarquent avec des réductions particulièrement intéressantes.

item.title: Its never been this cheap to snag the Eufy E15 robot lawn mower — save $850 at Amazon
item.description: The Eufy E15 robot lawn mower is on sale at Amazon for $949.99, down from the list price of $1,799.99. That's a 50% discount.

item.title: Quelle config PC pour Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced ? Tous les détails
item.description: Après des mois de spéculations, Ubisoft a enfin officialisé Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, le remake complet de l’opus sorti initialement en 2013. Qu'attendre de ce jeu et comment le faire tourner correctement ?

item.title: Users say new iPhones struggle to turn back on after the battery dies, despite recharging
item.description: Users are complaining that Apple's iPhone 17 lineup, plus the iPhone Air, struggles to turn back on after the battery dies.

item.title: A Star Wars expansion is coming to PowerWash Simulator 2
item.description: There's something deeply relaxing about chucking on a solid pair of headphones, listening to some good music and cleaning muck off structures and vehicles. Not in real life, though. Heavens, no. PowerWash Simulator 2 lets you do that without having to deal with any actual muck — as long as you're regularly cleaning your keyboard or controller, anyway.You'll soon be able to carry out powerwashing jobs in six more locations, all of which are in a galaxy far, far away. In the game's upcoming Star Wars expansion, you can visit the likes of Tatooine and Hoth to clean the Lars homestead, an X-wing a...

item.title: OpenAI breaks out of exclusivity agreements in its partnership with Microsoft
item.description: OpenAI is opening up its partnership with Microsoft in the latest amendment to the major multi-year collaboration between the tech giants. The latest changes allow OpenAI to offer its latest AI models to other companies and through other cloud providers, stripping Microsoft of its exclusivity rights. In a joint announcement posted on OpenAI and Microsoft's websites, Microsoft will still be OpenAI's primary cloud partner with the latest products shipping first on Azure, but OpenAI is now allowed to use any cloud provider. Sam Altman, OpenAI's CEO, posted on X that the company is "now able to ma...

item.title: AI data centers could be wrecking the environment faster than we thought
item.description: A revision to the UK's AI infrastructure plan ramps up potential carbon emissions by a million tons, stoking alarm from environmental advocates.

item.title: Samsung’s first smart glasses have leaked
item.description: The upcoming Samsung Galaxy Glasses look nearly identical to Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses in leaked images from Android Headlines. The glasses, which could be announced at Google I/O next month, are code-named "Jinju" and will reportedly cost between $379 and $499, on par with the display-free Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2. They'll reportedly include a Qualcomm […]...

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Glasses : voici la réponse de Samsung aux Ray-Ban Meta avec Gemini
item.description: Voici le design très probable des premières lunettes connectées de Samsung : les Galaxy Glasses. Ces dernières se doteraient d'Android XR et de Gemini pour faire face aux Ray-Ban Meta.

item.title: Microsoft and OpenAI’s famed AGI agreement is dead
item.description: OpenAI and Microsoft's partnership-turned-situationship just got even less committed. And a clause about artificial general intelligence, which has for years dictated the future of their deal, has officially been dropped. On Monday morning, Microsoft announced a handful of big changes to its long-standing OpenAI deal. Microsoft will remain OpenAI's "primary cloud partner, and OpenAI products will ship first […]...

item.title: Recharge en 9 minutes et 630 km d’autonomie : le nouveau BYD Atto 3 veut détrôner Tesla
item.description: BYD dévoile la troisième génération de l’Atto 3. Le nouveau venu grandit à vue d’œil et monte en gamme. Sa technique change le plus, avec l’arrivée du Flash Charging permettant une charge complète en 9 minutes.

item.title: Recharge en 10 minutes : Huawei mise sur le solaire et les batteries pour contourner la faiblesse des réseaux électriques
item.description: Huawei a présenté au Salon de Pékin une version améliorée de son système de recharge pour voiture électrique dont la puissance peut grimper jusqu'à 1 500 kW en crête, intégrant désormais des panneaux solaires et le stockage stationnaire d'énergie. Une évolution logique, mais qui intervient dans un contexte de course effrénée où BYD et CATL poussent également leurs pions. ...

item.title: Your company isn’t slow. It’s stuck
item.description: From wasted effort to stalled decisions, friction is quietly eroding performance and morale. For years, leaders have treated transformation as a question of strategy and technology. Do we have the right plan? The right tools? The right talent?

item.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
item.description: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

item.title: The M5 MacBook Air is the best MacBook for most people, and its just 99 cents away from its lowest price ever
item.description: The 13-inch M5 Apple MacBook Air is on sale at Amazon for $949.99, putting it just 99 cents away from its record low price of $949, and $149.01 away from its list price of $1,099.

item.title: Get in line! Tesla Supercharger fights are on the rise over queue-jumpers — so the EV giant is rolling out a new 'Virtual Queue' system to help diffuse 'screaming arguments'
item.description: No more fisticuffs at Tesla Supercharger stations, as EV company introduces 'Virtual Queue' system to avoid fights over queue-jumping.

item.title: ‘This was not an isolated incident’: Chinese national exposed by NASA investigation in serial defense software theft phishing campaign that lasted years
item.description: NASA, the military, and numerous universities and private companies were targeted by this phishing campaign.

item.title: How to get the McDonalds Stranger Things: Tales from 85 Happy Meal
item.description: McDonald's and Netflix have launched a "Stranger Things: Tales from '85"-themed Happy Meal. Here's when you can get it.

item.title: The feedback you’re not giving is costing more than you think
item.description: Feedback isn’t just about telling someone how they’re doing. It’s about building trust. If you’ve been avoiding giving feedback to someone on your team, you’re not alone. You’re in good company. Well . . . common company, at least.
